column54:
The culture needs to improve in all aspects. Be it the senior - junior culture, tech culture or even things like reddit, insta pages and all. A college's reputation is decided by the students at the end of the day.
The academics genuinely need to move on from their egos and try to support students rather than trying to find ways to trouble them. 
As long as professors who give F grades in LA courses exist, this college won't progress because a student will always be in a fear of getting a F grade even in courses which have no impact on our lives. 

Baaki this is a cool initiative, great work !
